die_dialog.title: Guide AI
die_dialog.text: Don't give up, Kaelen. The path is still ahead of you.

die_dialog.title: Guide AI
die_dialog.text: Every fall teaches something. Rise again and try.

die_dialog.title: Guide AI
die_dialog.text: The platform is still there. So are you. Keep going.

sequence.title: Guide AI
sequence.text: Kaelen. Welcome to Aether Reach. Three parkour courses await you. Each one is harder than the last. Reach the green platform at the end of each course to advance.

sequence.title: Level 1 - Begin
sequence.text: Your first course. Short and straightforward. Learn the rhythm of the jumps. Do not rush.

sequence.title: Level 1 - Complete
sequence.text: Well done, Kaelen. You found your footing. The next course adds diagonal jumps. The gap is the same but the angle changes. Stay sharp.

sequence.title: Level 2 - Begin
sequence.text: This course introduces diagonal platforms. Read the path ahead before each jump.

sequence.title: Level 2 - Complete
sequence.text: Impressive. You adapted quickly. The final course uses every jump type and is twice as long. This is the real challenge.

sequence.title: Level 3 - Final Challenge
sequence.text: Every jump is in play now. Rising diagonals, long gaps, sharp turns. Do not hesitate. Reach the platform and finish what you started.

sequence.title: Aether Reach - Complete
sequence.text: You did it, Kaelen. All three courses cleared. The Aether Reach is yours.
